prompt:
STYLE: a hyper-realistic premium studio product shot, 1:1 square, 4K. Editorial / commercial-catalog style — clean studio environment with refined accent lighting, no text.

SUBJECT: a photorealistic rendering of the Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar shown OPEN with LID OFF (matching the provided reference — black plastic jar, teal/cyan + gold/yellow accents, GOLD LID placed beside the jar at its base, clear plastic neck visible with dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES filling the jar to the brim, 5-6 extra cubes spilled artfully near the jar's base). Front label fully legible 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', side panel 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' in vertical teal strip. The jar occupies roughly the central 50-55% of the frame height — ZOOMED OUT with breathing room above and around the spilled cubes. Camera slightly above eye-level so the cubes inside the open jar are visible.

LIGHTING — CLEAN NEUTRAL STUDIO LIGHT ONLY: a soft large neutral-white key-light from upper-left, soft neutral-white fill from the right, gentle neutral-white wrap from above. NO colored rim-lights, NO blue tones, NO orange tones, NO duotone effects. Just clean even soft NEUTRAL WHITE STUDIO LIGHT. Soft specular highlight on the curved glossy black plastic. Gold lid (placed beside the jar) catches a clean warm-white highlight from its own reflectivity (not from a colored light source). The gummy cubes inside catch a soft top-light. Spilled cubes outside have soft neutral directional shadows. Label reads crisply.

BACKDROP: soft seamless studio gradient — pure white at top fading to warm cream-gray at the bottom horizon. The jar + lid + cubes sit on a SUBTLE GLOSSY REFLECTIVE SURFACE with soft mirror reflections beneath. Subtle atmospheric haze for depth.

NO TEXT, NO graphic overlays, NO additional props beyond the jar, gold lid, and gummy cubes.

STYLE: hyper-realistic product photography, 100mm macro look, f/8 sharp focus across the jar and the cubes, crystal-clear label legibility, editorial commercial product shot. Hyper-detailed plastic textures, realistic sugar-dust texture on the cubes, glossy reflections. Magazine-print quality.
